recommendations.title: Psycho IV: The Beginning
recommendations.overview: When he hears talk radio host Fran Ambrose discussing the topic of matricide, Norman calls in under a false name to tell his story.

recommendations.title: Critters 2
recommendations.overview: Three bounty hunters from space fly back to the town of Grovers Bend, hoping to save local residents from a new batch of Critter eggs.

recommendations.title: Riding the Bullet

recommendations.title: Sleepwalkers

recommendations.title: Shirley
recommendations.overview: A famous horror writer finds inspiration for her next book after she and her husband take in a young couple.

recommendations.title: Nightmare Cinema
recommendations.overview: A series of down-on-their-luck individuals enter the decrepit and spine-chilling Rialto theater, only to have their deepest and darkest fears brought to life on the silver screen by The Projectionist – a mysterious, ghostly figure who holds the night
recommendations.director: Ryuhei Kitamura, Alejandro Brugués, Mick Garris, David Slade, Joe Dante

recommendations.title: Pitfall
recommendations.overview: A man wanders into a seemingly deserted town with his young son in search of work. But after a bit of bad luck, he joins the town's population of lost souls.

recommendations.title: Maléfique
recommendations.overview: Four prisoners discover a handwritten book of black magic in their cell, and decide to use it to escape.

recommendations.title: The Jacket
recommendations.genres: Drama, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A military veteran goes on a journey into the future, where he can foresee his death and is left with questions that could save his life and those he loves.

recommendations.title: The House at the End of Time
recommendations.overview: The story of Dulce, a mother who has encounters with apparitions inside her old house. She must decipher a mystery that could trigger a prophecy: the death of her family.
